message:
feat(animation): add stagger utilities for coordinated list animations

Introduce stagger module for computing delay offsets across sequences of
animated items, enabling cascading entrance/exit effects.

StaggerMode options:
- Linear: Constant delay between items (offset[i] = i * delay)
- EaseIn: Accelerating delays (items bunch at end)
- EaseOut: Decelerating delays (items bunch at start)
- EaseInOut: S-curve distribution
- Random: Shuffled delays with optional seed for determinism

Key functions:
- stagger_offsets(count, delay, mode): Compute offset vec
- stagger_iter(): Lazy iterator version for large lists

AnimationGroup enhancements:
- Integration hooks for staggered animations
- Shared lifecycle management across stagger sets

Invariants:
- Empty count → empty vec
- Single item → [Duration::ZERO]
- Zero delay → all offsets zero
- First offset always zero for non-Random modes
- Monotonically non-decreasing offsets (except Random)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
